subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #054 The Procession of the Human Spirit from God
subcodes.first_line: Know that procession is of two kinds:  procession and appearance through emanation and procession and appearance through manifestation.
subcodes.first_line_orig: بدان که قیام بر دو قسم است قیام و تجلی صدوری و قیام و تجلی ظهوری
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @The Holy Spirit, @Manifestation of God as mirror, @origin of the soul; the soul as emanation
